results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Per-dimension binary Pass/Fail conjunctive gating + evidence-anchored scoring IS the all-K-partial-pass conjunctive gating + fundamental-reference anchoring mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Recursive rubric decomposition into fine-grained discriminative criteria + correlation-aware weighting covers harmonic-partial dimension projection.
EXACT TWIN — Multidimensional + calibrated LLM-Rubric automated text evaluation IS the multi-criteria rubric-anchored LLM judge mechanism.
Multi-rubric framework integrating Technical + Argumentative + Explanation-focused dimensions covers harmonic-partial multi-aspect projection mechanism.
Task-adaptive rubrics for LLM agent evaluation covers adaptive multi-dimension rubric scoring.
Criterion validity for multi-criterion LLM-as-Judge covers anchored multi-aspect scoring mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Anchor papers + anchor distribution as calibration mechanism IS the fundamental-reference embedding anchor mechanism.
Multi-agent LLM judge with sample-selection + evaluation + rewrite covers multi-stage rubric evaluator mechanism.
